# Mangrove Ecosystem

**Summary**: Salt-tolerant trees and shrubs that grow in coastal intertidal zones.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] investigated the role of mangrove ecosystems as filters for contaminants.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] Used as a natural barrier and sink for marine pollutants.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] Field survey and observation.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Avicennia marina is the only dominant species currently surviving on the Saudi coast. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 28]])
